title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 441.645 - Act of God, tenant not liable for rent
text:
441.645.  Act of God, tenant not liable for rent. — If a residence is destroyed by an act of God, including but not limited to fire or a tornado, or other natural disaster or man-made disaster, so long as the tenant was not the person who caused the disaster, the tenant shall not be liable to the landlord for rent during the remainder of the term of the lease agreement.
(L. 2010 H.B. 1692, et al.)
